chapters.notes: Opening good message, John, baptism, heavens torn open, Spirit descent, wilderness testing, reign proclamation, first disciples, Capernaum authority, healing and cleansing.
Capernaum house, roof opening, release/healing, Son of Humanity authority, Levi call, table fellowship, fasting/bridegroom, new wine, Sabbath grainfields.
Sabbath healing, hardness of heart, Pharisees/Herodians plot, crowds, Twelve appointed, Beelzebul controversy, binding the strong one, Spirit warning, family redefinition.
Sea teaching, sower, mystery of the reign, Isaiah hearing/seeing, soils, lamp, measure, seed growing secretly, mustard seed, parables, storm calming.
Gerasene release, Legion naming, restored witness in Decapolis, Jairus, hemorrhaging woman, sozo as saved/healed, daughter language, fear/trust, Talitha koum.
Nazareth rejection, sending the Twelve, John/Herod narrative, feeding five thousand, prayer mountain, sea-walking, ego eimi/I am, heart hardened around loaves, Gennesaret healings.
Purity/tradition debate, Corban, heart-output teaching, Syrophoenician woman, crumbs/table mercy, deaf man healing, Ephphatha/Be opened.
Feeding four thousand, sign demand, leaven of Pharisees/Herod, loaves misunderstanding, Bethsaida two-stage sight, Peter confession, first passion prediction, cross-following and psyche language.
Transfiguration, Elijah/John pattern, difficult healing, I trust/help my untrust, second passion prediction, child/greatness, outsider in the name, little ones, Gehenna, salt/fire sayings.
Divorce debate, children, rich man, camel/needle, coming age and age-long life, third passion prediction, servant greatness, ransom language, Bartimaeus following on the way.
Jerusalem entry, colt, Hosanna, fig tree/temple frame, house of prayer for all nations, cave of robbers, trust/prayer/release, authority dispute.
Vineyard tenants, rejected cornerstone, Caesar/image, resurrection dispute, Shema/greatest command, David/Lord question, scribes warning, poor widow's whole living.

translation_notes: Mark's opening euangelion should be rendered as good message/good news with imperial-public-announcement resonance preserved.
Metanoia language should be rendered contextually as turning/realignment rather than guilt-heavy repentance.
Basileia tou Theou should be rendered as reign/realm of the Divine, not merely a distant place.
Immediately/euthys is a major Markan pacing signal and should be preserved where readable.
Unclean spirit / daimonion scenes should use careful spirit-language without over-importing later demonology.
Son of Humanity should preserve huios tou anthropou resonance rather than flattening to a distant title only.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace the source-audited restored text.
Mark 2 preserves aphiemi as release, pistis as trust, and Sabbath as gift for the human rather than human subordination to Sabbath.
Mark 3 preserves the Spirit controversy as mislabeling Spirit-work, not a generalized fear framework; family is redefined around doing the Divine will.
Mark 4 preserves parable epistemology: mystery, hearing, seeing, measure, hidden growth, and trust tested by the storm.

Mark 5-8 preserves Mark's layered sight/understanding arc: restoration from fragmentation, daughter/trust language, loaves as heart-understanding, purity as heart-output, Gentile table mercy, Ephphatha/opening, Peter's confession, and the adversarial function appearing as human resistance to the cross path.

Mark 9-12 preserves the discipleship road: transfiguration, trust/untrust, servant-lastness, child-reception, Gehenna as warning imagery, wealth critique, ransom/service, Bartimaeus sight, fig tree/temple fruit frame, Caesar/image, resurrection as transformed life, Shema and neighbor-love.
next_actions: Continue Mark 13-16: Olivet discourse, anointing, Passover meal, Gethsemane, arrest, trial, crucifixion, burial, empty tomb, shorter/longer ending notes.

Add glossary entries or reuse shared Greek glossary hooks: euangelion, metanoia, basileia, euthys, pneuma, daimonion, huios tou anthropou, parabole, pistis, aphiemi, sozo, aion, mysterion, distazo, ego eimi, ephphatha, talitha-koum, psyche, koinos, Gehenna, lytron, bios, and Shema.
